title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 631.175 - Other sections which apply to alcohol or drug abuse facilities
text:
631.175.  Other sections which apply to alcohol or drug abuse facilities. — The provisions of sections 632.315, 632.390, 632.405, 632.410, 632.415, 632.425, 632.435, 632.440, 632.445 and 632.450 shall also apply to court procedures, evaluations, admissions, detention, treatment, and rehabilitation in alcohol or drug abuse facilities.
(L. 1985 S.B. 265, A.L. 1989 S.B. 215 & 58)
